title: Data files: Single-cell RNA sequencing of Plasmodium vivax sporozoites reveals stage- and species-specific transcriptomic signatures
author: Ruberto, Anthony
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Scripts, preprocessed count matrices, single-cell data objects, and generated data (tables and .rds files) from the scRNA-seq analyses performed in  “Single-cell RNA sequencing of Plasmodium vivax sporozoites reveals stage- and species-specific transcriptomic signatures".
steps_raw: Scripts, preprocessed count matrices, single-cell data objects, and generated data (tables and .rds files) from the scRNA-seq analyses performed in  “Single-cell RNA sequencing of Plasmodium vivax sporozoites reveals stage- and species-specific transcriptomic signatures".
